text: I am struck by the contrast between the sterile, utilitarian design of the hallway and the vibrant, intellectual energy of the R+D exhibit. Here, thought is externalized onto walls—inviting me to reflect on the interplay of humans and intelligent machines. I feel curious, yet a bit small, surrounded by all this evidence of collective striving and innovation. There's a subtle sense of anticipation, as if something significant could be discovered in this very room.
